description: Fix Neovim error when sf.nvim attempts to paste output into a non-modifiable buffer, enabling seamless Salesforce CLI integration

userStories.title: Diagnose sf.nvim buffer handling issue
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to understand why sf.nvim fails with 'modifiable is off' error so we can fix it properly.
acceptanceCriteria: Identify which sf.nvim command triggers the error (SF metadata push? retrieve? test run?)
Test if specific buffer types trigger it (help buffers, read-only files, etc.)
Review sf.nvim source code (xixiaofinland/sf.nvim) to understand buffer management
Document root cause in .planning/DEBUG_SF_NVIM.md with reproduction steps
Include stack trace and error context from original issue
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement buffer modifiable check in sf.nvim wrapper
userStories.description: As a user, I want sf.nvim commands to work without buffer errors by checking modifiable state before writing.
acceptanceCriteria: Add guard checking vim.bo.modifiable before sf.nvim output operations
If non-modifiable: create new scratch buffer or toggle modifiable safely
Preserve existing buffer content and state
Maintain all existing sf.nvim functionality
No breaking changes to current sf.nvim workflows
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add error recovery and user guidance
userStories.description: As a user experiencing the error, I want helpful guidance on how to recover or prevent it.
acceptanceCriteria: Catch 'modifiable is off' error specifically in error handler
Display actionable message (e.g., 'Buffer is read-only. Create new buffer? [y/n]')
Suggest creating new buffer, opening in split, or toggling modifiable
Log detailed error info to Neovim log for debugging
Prevent error from blocking user workflow
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Test fix with all SF commands
userStories.description: As a developer using sf.nvim, I want all Salesforce commands to work without buffer errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Test <leader>sp (SF metadata push) — no error, output visible
Test <leader>sr (SF metadata retrieve) — no error, output visible
Test <leader>sta (SF apex test run_all) — no error, output visible
Test <leader>stt (SF apex test run_current) — no error, output visible
Test <leader>so (SF org open) — no error, opens browser
Test <leader>sl (SF org list) — no error, shows org list
All tests pass without modifiable buffer errors
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Document error and fix in README Troubleshooting
userStories.description: As a user, I want to know why this error happened and how to prevent it in the future.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'sf.nvim buffer modifiable error' section to Troubleshooting
Explain what 'modifiable is off' means and why it happens
Document the automatic fix applied in our config
Include manual workaround (toggle modifiable, create new buffer)
Explain when this error might still occur (edge cases)
Link to DEBUG_SF_NVIM.md for technical details
Typecheck passes
